titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in China ( Stuart )

div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in China ( Stuart )
div.p: 903. From ButterworthW. Walton Butterworth, Director of the Office of Far Eastern Affairs. for Clark.Lewis Clark, Minister-Counselor of Embassy in China. Ward Mukden has forwarded me copy his letter May 28 to youNot printed. re question retention staff in event Communist occupation that city. In view circumstances set forth Ward’s letter we are inclined view sympathetically his recommendations. However, cuts in Dept’s appropriations require reduction staffs in posts throughout world. Dept has, therefore, found it necessary reduce Mukden FSO complement to 2 and FSS complement to 7. Mukden being notified these changes in separate communication.Not printed.

Please inform Ward foregoing and add that Dept sympathizes his position and difficulties and wishes assure him every desire to take all possible steps assist him this critical period. As indicated Deptel 5 Jan. 2,Not printed. it is assumed Emb has taken necessary action to send Mukden supplies requested by Ward against eventuality Communist occupation and cutting communications. [Butterworth.]
